examples: The sun broke through the clouds
The rescue team broke through the wall in the mine shaft

meanings.definition: succeed in reaching a real or abstract destination after overcoming problems
examples: We finally got through the bureaucracy and could talk to the Minister

meanings.definition: continue in existence after (an adversity, etc.)
examples: He survived the cancer against all odds

meanings.definition: attain success or reach a desired goal
examples: We succeeded in getting tickets to the show
she struggled to overcome her handicap and won
